name: Valentine Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the candy coating in a double boiler or over very low heat, just until melted. Do not overheat.
2. Stir in the cereal and stir to completely coat the cereal with the candy coating.
3. Spread the mixture on a waxed paper-lined tray.
4. Cool to set.
5. Break into pieces for serving or gift giving.
Makes 1 1/2 pounds.
